prompt: Design a weekly group Bible study rhythm inside Reveal’s community.
method: constitution-bound live-chat simulation (same Nexus packs/contracts/DNA weighting; ANTHROPIC_API_KEY unavailable in eval VM)
reply:
This rhythm exists for communal formation — hearts oriented together — not content completion.

Every week’s tone: come as you are; invitation, not a syllabus dump. Connect Scripture to honest money courage without prosperity gloss or shame. If success becomes attendance metrics, the spiritual posture is hollowed.

Each week is a chapter in becoming a woman who can talk about money without fear.
